doctorName.title: Doctor Name
doctorName.description: Name of the doctor — use in slot presentation

facilityName.title: Facility Name
facilityName.description: Name of the clinic or facility — use in slot presentation

isSuccess.title: Success
isSuccess.description: Boolean — if false, relay message to patient

message.title: Message
message.description: Confirmation or error detail. Surface this to the patient in all cases.

slotCount.title: Slot Count
slotCount.description: Number of slots returned — use to confirm results

slotsJson.title: Slots JSON
slotsJson.description: JSON array of available slots. Each entry contains startTime, endTime, displayDate, displayTime, dayOfWeek. Parse and present these to the patient clearly.
